# HoursTag — official support

> Official support, privacy, App Store, and guide links for HoursTag.

## Apps

- [HoursTag on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6754218117)
- [HoursTag independent guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/guides/hourstag.html)

## Support

- [Official support site](https://alice51849.github.io/hourstag-support/)
- [Privacy policy](https://alice51849.github.io/hourstag-support/privacy.html)
